crud_endpoint_router_schema_tests.description: For endpoint work, inspect routers and schemas together and always add tests.

crud_endpoint:inspect_test_failure.skill_notes: conventions: Test output includes the file path, line number, and failing assertion; Prefer fixing the implementation over changing the test assertion; Only change the test assertion if the test expectation itself was wrong | constraints: Do not change test assertions to paper over a broken implementation; Do not add new tests to fix a failing test — fix the root cause instead; Do not modify files unrelated to the failing test
